name: files.read
description: Read file contents from the local filesystem. Supports reading entire files or specific line ranges. Returns file content with metadata including line count and encoding.

path.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the file to read (required)

start_line.description: 1-based starting line number for partial reads (optional)

end_line.description: 1-based ending line number (inclusive) for partial reads (optional)

line_count.description: Total number of lines in the file

encoding.description: Encoding used to read the file

error.description: Error message if success is false
